examples: This paper presents also some practical experience on the setting of concentrated developer replenisher flow rate.
Besides, light salt water is a good kind of replenisher to cure of serious dehydration and to ease patients' weakness.
With these equations we have designed for helium-cadmium lasers a new type of helium replenisher, which has lengthened the life time of a He-Cd laser to over 1000 hours so far.
